parameters.jsCode:
const reply = $json.choices[0].message.content;
return [{ json: { reply, source: 'n8n' } }];

assignments.name: error
assignments.value: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.

meta.notes: After import: create an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'OpenAI Header Auth' with header name 'Authorization' and value 'Bearer <your OPENAI_API_KEY>', then reselect it on the 'Call OpenAI' node. See workflows/n8n_workflow_setup.md.
